title: UltraCraft - Explore Anywhere
description: Adds new features like workbenches, potions, blocks, woodtypes, biomes, structures, ores and More!
body:
Made With MCreator!

Adds new features like workbenches, potions, blocks, woodtypes, biomes, structures, ores and More!

First mod published by me!

 

V1.0 Release:

- More Workbenches
- More Structures
- Tons of New Ores
- Lots of new Armor and Tools
- Diamond & Emerald Nuggets
- The Blockyness Dimention (From @ProGLF14, Go sub to him on youtube)
- Added Some Potions
- 3 New Biome (Quenched Forest, Dry Forest, and White Woods)
- Tons of acheivements
V1.0.04 Release:

- Added Unbreakable Reinforced Blocks (For Admin Use)
V1.1 Release:

- Changed ores to be more common
V1.1.5 Release

- Changed ores to drop with stone or iron pickaxes.
